items.title: Kim Jong Un was meant to be their only idol - then North Koreans discovered K-pop
items.dek: Defectors tell the BBC that despite restrictions, K-pop has cut through in the stifling dictatorship.
items.body: Defectors tell the BBC that despite restrictions, K-pop has cut through in the stifling dictatorship.

items.title: Trump threatens to tariff Canada over wildfire smoke choking northern US cities
items.dek: Canadian leader Mark Carney says both the US and Canada have an equal responsibility to fight climate change, which experts say are worsening wildfire condition
